externalResult.test: Conformance Classes - Core + SystemFeatures + Common + Subsystems + Procedures + Deployments + SamplingFeatures + PropertyDefinitions + Subdeployments + GeoJSON + SensorML + AdvancedFiltering + CreateReplaceDelete + Update + Part2ApiCommon + Part2Datastream + Part2ControlStream + Part2Feasibility + Part2SystemEvent + Part2AdvancedFiltering (OGC 23-001 /conf/core, /conf/system, /conf/subsystem, /conf/procedure, /conf/deployment, /conf/sf, /conf/property, /conf/subdeployment, /conf/geojson, /conf/sensorml, /conf/advanced-filtering, /conf/create-replace-delete, /conf/update; OGC 23-002 /conf/api-common, /conf/datastream, /conf/controlstream, /conf/feasibility, /conf/system-event, /conf/advanced-filtering; OGC 19-072 /conf/common)

fixtures.change: adds uniqueId urn:ets:system:weather-station-01 for deterministic retained-state identity

openAPI.classification: description-only alignment: removes legacy position text, documents strict client ID handling, and updates canonical lower-kebab predicate names

noWriteReplayReview.assessment: Revision persistence and normalized predicate, relationship, entity, collection, spatial, scoped, schema, and observation query equivalence are independently proven across the no-write restart.

upstreamProductionReadinessConcern.aggregateError: graceful shutdown failed: stop errors: [failed to stop service heartbeat: heartbeat service not running (status: stopped)]
upstreamProductionReadinessConcern.classification: The shutdown path appears to stop heartbeat twice or treats an already-stopped service as an error. The archived repeated restart recovered, post-restart index readiness returned 118/118, and all 11 normalized replay bodies remained identical, so this did not create or conceal the 137/0/0 result or corrupt replay state. It remains an upstream lifecycle/idempotence concern that must be resolved or explicitly dispositioned before production authorization.

limits.reason: Task 9.5 proves only that the external green result was not obtained by weakening the ETS, fixtures, API contract, or claims. The no-write replay evidence is now complete, but operational approvals and the heartbeat lifecycle concern remain outside this approval.
